ASR Outdoor 16" 3 IN 1 Emergency Preparedness Mini Folding Shovel Pick and Saw

ASR Outdoor is proud to present our 16" 3 IN 1 Emergency Preparedness Mini Folding Shovel Pick and Saw. This is a must-have for every outdoor enthusiast and your emergency preparedness and survival kits. Our shovel folds down to a compact size with a carrying case so that you can easily take it, pack, and carry it in your gear or emergency preparedness and survival kit. It includes a shovel, pick, and saw.

Key Features

  • MATERIAL - #50 carbon steel material
  • HARDNESS - Heat treated for local hardness
  • EASY GRIP - Rubber handle to prevent slipping
  • EASY CARRY - Mini, folds to compact size
  • FEATURES - Includes shovel, pick, and saw

Product Specifications

  • MPN: MFSPS
  • UPC: 060886181682
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 16 in

Features of our 3-IN-1 Emergency Mini Folding Shovel with Carrying Case includes a Serrated edge to cut through packed dirt, roots, and tough foliage, Extended length: 16-1/8", Compact folded length: 6-1/8", Shovel head dimensions: 3" x 4-7/8", Shovel thickness: 1/16", Heat treated for local hardness, #50 carbon steel material, Knurled rubber handle for sure grip, Black color, Compact, and durable.
